programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: When Mesorog, an evil scientist, unleashes Bio Zords on the city, former Power Ranger Tommy Oliver recruits three high school kids to become Power Rangers and tame the beasts.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: When Mesogog releases his Bio Zords on the city, Tommy has no choice but to give three teens Dino Morphers to turn them into Power Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Conner's given a shot at playing professional soccer, but his Ranger duties impede this once-in-a-lifetime chance. Will he give up helping to save the world for a sports career?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: As Tommy is held captive by Mesogog, the teens work with Hayley to attempt to rescue him.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Utilizing Hayley's help, and their new Raptor Cycles, the DinoThunder Rangers storm the island base on a mission to rescue Tommy from Mesogog's clutches. Will they get there before the Black Dino Gem falls into evil's hands?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Kira's old singing partner, the now famous Kylee Styles comes to town, just as Mesogo releases the Donkeyvac monster, who sucks the youth from people and turns them old.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Ethan is zapped into a video game.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: As Trent's father purchases the Café and threatens to fire Hayley to put Trent in charge, Zeltrax releases a new creation to destroy the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: A new Dinozord Egg is uncovered by the Rangers during a class archeological dig, but Tyranodrones interfere, allowing Elsa to snag the Egg first.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Nikki Valentina, star of the most popular TV show, visits Reef side during filming of an episode of her show.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Trent accidentally bonds with the White Dino Gem, and becomes the White Dino Thunder Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: The evil White Ranger finds his own Dragozord Dino Egg, and begins to bond it to him by feeding it energy from his Morpher.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Tommy discovers the identity of the White Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Realizing he is the White Ranger, Trent quits his job in an attempt to protect his friends.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: A strange meteorite lands in the forest and its effects brings out repressed personality traits in anyone it comes in contact with.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Hayley hatches a plan using Insectolite to release the Zords stolen by Trent, but they show up too late. To their horror, they find that the Zords are now under the White Ranger's control!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: While helping Tommy clean up his lab, Kira stumbles onto a secret bone.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: A school bully sets his sights on Ethan. Meanwhile, Tommy discovers the true identity of Zeltrax.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Conner finds Ethan and Kira at their usual hangout enjoying the new satellite cable that Hayley has hooked up and is frustrated with them.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: When Kira lands a new job as an intern on the Funky Fisherman cartoon show, Cassidy is dismayed to discover she was passed over.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: As Anton Mercer explains to Trent that Mesogog was an experiment gone horribly wrong, Zeltrax creates the Copyotter to attack the city.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Zeltrax samples a portion of the new Evil White Ranger clone's energy and creates the White Terrorsaurus monster. With it, and the clone, he helps confuse the Power Rangers about their newest team member's loyalty.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: When Kira's manager wants to shoot a music video with her, she feels compelled to compromise her style.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: While Elsa works on her plan to shoot a powerful laser beam at Jupiter, Kira and Ethan help Cassidy land a job at the TV station.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Ethan takes an interest in deciphering the hieroglyphics of Egyptian ruler Tutenhawken, but not only jinxes himself, causing chaos at his every step, but frees the ancient evil from his multi-millennia-long slumber.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: To help her mutant flower grow into the Thornox monster, Elsa uses a sample of a mysterious green slime. Meanwhile, Tommy attempts to use the same slime to demorph.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Tommy's invisibility problem is solved, but as a result, his Dino Gem is shattered, and he ends up in a coma!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Conner gets involved with an environmentalist campaign to save a hundred-year-old tree, all, so he can impress a girl named Krista.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Ethan's overly confident, and downright cocky attitude concerning his skills at playing the “Detonation Man” computer game begins to get on everyone's nerves. Meanwhile, Volcanologist Dr. Morton gets turned into a Horn-Rimmed Monster by Elsa.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: Upon discovering that his days are numbered due to the fact two White Dino Thunder Rangers can't exist for much longer, the Evil White Ranger clone targets our heroes one last time.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Thunder
programme.desc: A Dino Thunder/Ninja Storm crossover event: when the Abyss of Evil is opened, Lothor returns and casts a spell on Shane, Tori, and Dustin, turning them evil and setting them loose on Reefside.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Reform School
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters the TAPS team investigates Preston Castle, a once notorious reform school for boys in Northern California.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghosts in the Attic
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS has been called to the Grzelak house in Massachusetts where they have been experiencing paranormal activity since the day they moved in 30 years ago.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Inn of the Dead
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Cape Cod to investigate the Orleans Inn. Some of the claims here are that candles light on their own, glasses slide off tables, and hauntings by two separate men who hung themselves.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Spirits of the Night
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS visits the home of the Scully family, who are so terrified they are ready to pack up and move.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Norwich State
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS becomes the first paranormal team to be invited to investigate Norwich State Hospital, in Norwich, Connecticut.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Hotel
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS drivesto the Otesaga Resort Hotel in Cooperstown, NY. Employees are terrified by voices calling out to themand doors swinging all on their own.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: America's First Zoo
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to the oldest zoo in the country, The Philadelphia Zoo, which boastsa reported Native American burial ground that lies beneath the grounds.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Uninvited Guests
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS has been asked to help the 1875 Inn in Tilton, New Hampshire. The Inn has had two major fires, one of which supposedly took the life of a child named Laura, who now haunts the hotel.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS visits the location of the \\"shot heard round the world\\" at the Colonial Inn in Concord, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Signals From the Past
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the TAPS team is on Rose Island to investigate their haunted lighthouse. This island housed cholera victims exiled from Newport, and many of the sick never returned to the mainland.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Lemp Mansion
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the TAPS team is invited to Lemp Mansion in St. Louis, Missouri. There have been tragic deaths at this mansion with the patriarch and three of his children taking their own lives.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is asked to investigate the abandoned Milton School in Alton, Ill. where some studentsare said to still be walking through the halls.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Time To Get Touched
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Ohio and to the Thurber house, the home of author James Thurber, whowrote The Night the Ghost Got In based off his paranormal experiences there.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS returns to Mansfield, Ohio to investigate the Bissman Building, where the current manager, Ellis Byrd, was nearly choked to death by a black mist.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los medallistas olímpicos de invierno Sasha Cohen y Jonny Moseley aparecen como jueces invitados. Para este desafío, todos los ingredientes deben provenir de Whistler, B.C.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete
programme.desc: En la parte final de este especial de dos horas, los cinco concursantes restantes descubren que ya no compiten como equipos, sino como individuos.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Peoplelog"--a social media service that uses AI to analyze the incredible amount of data on the internet, allowing you to learn all about a person.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko has been captured. She's being held at Orig Island, the headquarters of Shake Hands. Lupin and the gang, including Ami, head there to find her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Papa! Save Lupin!" Ami is reunited with her long-last father. But Enzo is already obsessed with using Peoplelog to save the world.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin III has vanished from the internet. Meanwhile, the man himself is updating Peoplelog with confidential information that begins to throw the world into chaos.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin receives an invitation to join a race by Mr. X. Jigen and Goemon questions Lupin's willingness to join despite knowing it's a trap, but Lupin has his eyes on the Golden Statue rumored to be in a mansion near the race course.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #17: Tactics Of Angels
programme.desc: Lupin faces his toughest opponents yet! Four women known as the Bloody Angels are after the strange metallic sphere he stole from Area 51. To get their hands on potential alien technology, they're willing to do anything.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #19: The Elusiveness of the Fog
programme.desc: Lupin's attempt to steal a time machine causes a crazy mishap! Now stuck in ancient Japan, his team and Inspector Zenigata must join forces to get back to their own time. But notorious thief Lupin has enemies everywhere... and everywhen!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #20: Sweet Lost Night
programme.desc: Turns out the Magic Lamp is real, and Lupin's found a way to steal it! But this genie has a price: to grant his wish, she demands half his memories.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/92: In a critical Game 7 of the 1992 NLCS, Sid Bream delivered one of the most memorable moments in Braves' history, as he edged out Barry Bonds' throw to home plate to seal the team's trip to the 1992 World Series

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/24/1992: The Toronto Blue Jays take home Canada's first-ever World Series in 1992, beating the Braves 4-3 in Game 6 with a clutch extra-base hit from Dave Winfield in the top of the 11th inning.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/8/93: 24-year-old Darryl Kile took the mound against the Mets and put together an impressive performance in his first career no-hitter in the Astros' 7-1 victory.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/22/75: Tony Pérez started the Reds' comeback in Game 7, smashing a two-run home run over the Green Monster and onto Lansdowne Street. Jim Burtan scored Ken Griffey in the top of the 9th to break a 3-3 tie and give the Reds their third World Series win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/23/88 - The Yankees headed to the bottom of the 9th down 4-3 to the Red Sox. Rickey Henderson helped orchestrate the tying run and give New York hope. Bases loaded and two outs, Claudell Washington scored the winning run on an error by Jody Reed.

programme.title: MST3K: High School Big Shot
programme.desc: The crew fights lapsing into a depression while watching the incredibly dour High School Big Shot in which a high school loser takes part in a heist

programme.title: MST3K: Invasion U.S.A.
programme.desc: A group of barflies must figure out what to do when the Soviets attack the U.S. in Invasion USA (1952)

programme.title: Merlin's Shop of Mystical Wonders
programme.desc: A grandfather tells his grandson several horrifying stories involving the wizard Merlin and a stolen monkey doll in Merlin's Shop of Mystical Wonders (1996).

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A band of no-good punks beat a guy for driving too slow and steal his mechanical pencil, before arriving to pick up their missing member Jamie, the son of the man they've just beaten.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hercules Unchained
programme.desc: While trying to resolve a quarrel between warring brothers Eteocles and Polynices, Hercules is taken captive by Queen Omphale of Lydia.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A prank gone wrong leads to children taking on a dangerous new sport.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hellcats
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots attempt to puzzle out what's going on in the unintelligible biker film, The Hellcats (1968). Flashbacks from earlier episodes fill out the host segments.

programme.title: MST3K: Zombie Nightmare
programme.desc: A hit-and-run victim is brought back from the dead by a voodoo doctor, and then seeks revenge.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Mitchell
programme.desc: The trio sit through a dreary Joe Don Baker disasterpiece as Gypsy tries to find a way to save Joel from being killed by the Mads.

programme.title: MST3K: The Christmas Dragon
programme.desc: All three hosts watch a group of precocious orphans attempt save a dying Father Christmas in THE CHRISTMAS DRAGON (2014).

programme.desc: Audrina believes a rumor she hears: that Lauren hooked up with Justin. Meanwhile, Holly tries to get Heidi away from Spencer.

programme.title: Are You The One?

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.desc: When multi-millionaire Marvin Estes dies from an apparent suicide, leaving his fortune to supposed girlfriend Theresa LaValle, Matlock must find the missing beneficary.

programme.desc: The detectives have to decide if the murder of a young GP killed the wrong victim, or if the recently engaged Dr. James Kirkwood was really the intended target.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby is implicated in a murder when a photo of him in a passionate embrace with another woman is displayed shortly before the woman’s estranged photographer husband is strangled.

programme.desc: When the director of ‘The Scarlet Pimpernel’ is beheaded by a guillotine on set, Barnaby and Jones must find the killer before the case becomes as bloody as the French Revolution.

programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate a murder of a former friend and colleague in Midsomer Holm, a small village inhabited by reformed ex-cons.

programme.desc: Heather's pregnancy test puts things into perspective for Josh Altman; James and David may walk away from the St. Ives listing; Josh Flagg shifts his focus to a personal issue; David heads off to Italy to pop the question to Adrian.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Barney is blinded in an accident, a bride-to-be is buried alive and Paris poses as a man he is unaware is marked for death in the second of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A trained falcon is summoned in a last-ditch rescue attempt when Jim Phelps finds his IMF endangered by a traitor's assassination plot in the last of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To head off a threatened atomic blast, Jim Phelps gains entry to a top secret nuclear plant by posing as a temperamental artist with guest star Barbara Luna as his model on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: As a doctor with a startling new treatment for amnesia, Jim Phelps forces Paris to relive another man's past when the IMF pushes a search for stolen nuclear material on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A dog that collects rare stamps -- on command from the IMF -- figures in a perilous journey to the stronghold of a narcotics kingpin (guest star Fernando Lamas) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF hides a young prince from assassins by disguising him as a gypsy girl, then Paris sets out to betray the boy to his pursuers on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: In the midst of delicate operations to identify the chief of an espionage ring, Jim Phelps realizes that Paris has fallen in love with an enemy agent on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief (guest star Pernell Roberts) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about how people make chalk. Mayor Maggie reports that all of the vacuum sweepers in Westwood are missing. King Friday assigns Lady Aberlin, Mayor Maggie and Prince Tuesday to find the missing vacuums.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets with some children who are making crafts at the Inner City Art Center in Los Angeles. In Make-Believe, Lady Elaine's friends help her conquer her fears.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely look at snow globes and see a film about how people make cereal. King Friday says he is the bravest and strongest in the neighborhood. Cereal is falling like snow. Mister Rogers goes to a Tae Kwon Do class.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers returns a scarf to one of Mr. Brewer's puppets which makes the puppet feel brave and strong. Elsie Jean Platypus tells Lady Abelrin that the cereal quit falling on her because she was not afraid of it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the McFeelys, who are watching after young lambs. Handyman Negri and King Friday put on full cereal-proof armor. When their efforts fail, it is clear that Daniel is the only one who can stop the cereal from falling.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use tuning whistles. Daniel has the idea to give the cereal to people who might need food. Neighbor Aber brings a forklift to gather all the boxes. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Misterios sin resolver
programme.desc: Presentado por Robert Stack, esta serie usa recreaciones y entrevistas para volver a narrar las circunstancias de los misterios que permanecen sin resolver. Cubriendo crímenes, historias de un amor perdido, historias inexplicadas y eventos paranormales.

programme.title: Xploración espacio profundo
programme.desc: Emily Calandrelli descubre el momento en que el histórico programa Apollo cambió nuestro mundo para siempre.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Incluso los lugares más inofensivos pueden guardar las cicatrices de un pasado retorcido. El mal puede perdurar a través del tiempo, puede permanecer latente hasta que alguna persona ingenua o algún inocente se crucen en su camino sin darse cuenta.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Todos tenemos secretos. Algunos de nosotros les ocultamos cosas a nuestros amigos para evitar la vergüenza. Otros, se las ocultamos a nuestros seres queridos porque tenemos el temor de que estropeen la imagen que tienen de nosotros.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El nacimiento y la muerte son etapas naturales de la vida. Sin embargo, algunas veces la muerte no es el capítulo final. A menudo, espíritus inquietos deambulan por la tierra buscando atormentar con su furia eterna a los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Entre los psíquicos del mundo que afirman poseer habilidades extrasensoriales, los hay quienes dicen que pueden retroceder en el tiempo y ser testigos de acontecimientos del pasado que se desarrollan ante ellos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los nuevos comienzos son siempre emocionantes. Pero sin importar cuánto deseemos que ocurran, siempre llegan con cierto grado de ansiedad y dificultad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ciertos mitos nativos norteamericanos hablan de criaturas sobrenaturales que protegen a los muertos. Los primeros exploradores de algunas tribus algonquinas del noreste de los Estados Unidos contaban historias sobre hombres lobo.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: A lo largo de todo Estados Unidos existen millones de cementerios rurales. Algunos están muy mal identificados y, con el paso del tiempo, pueden ser olvidados con facilidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Abril James siempre había soñado con renovar una casa victoriana. Cuando ella y su prometido Matt compran una casa histórica en Salt Lake City, estado de Utah.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La infancia debería ser una etapa de descubrimiento lúdico y de regocijo inocente. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando las realidades del reino paranormal traspasan sus barreras y despiertan el mal verdadero?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Jerusalén es una ciudad santa para judíos, cristianos y musulmanes, y cada uno tiene su piedra sagrada aquí: el Muro de los Lamentos, la Piedra del Santo Sepulcro y la Roca debajo de la famosa cúpula de oro.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Este es un retrato real de Mayotte, una isla donde los pequeños pueblos viven en paz con costumbres ancestrales y donde abunda la creatividad de la naturaleza.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: Aprende las astutas tácticas que los animales utilizan para establecer jerarquías, asegurar recursos, ganar territorio y seducir a sus parejas.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: Ngorongoro, que se cree que se formó hace unos 2,5 millones de años a partir de una gran implosión volcánica, es ahora una tierra fértil llena de fauna y flora silvestres.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre: Conoce los suricatos
programme.desc: Este documental se desarrolla en el poderoso desierto de Kalahari de Sudáfrica. Sigue a una familia de suricatas gregarias por un día, dirigida por una hembra dominante.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Waldo se niega a ser el padre del bebé de Chelsea por su piel clara. Después, Kianna encontró fotos de mujeres desnudas en el teléfono de Nick y condones y colonia en su bolso de gimnasio. ¿Qué dirán los resultados del detector de mentiras de Maury?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Es Cortney el padre de los hijos de Brittany? Según su hermana, Brittany fue infiel con su prometido Clifton. Después, Melissa afirma que su ex-marido no es el padre de sus gemelos y que es Sean! ¿Lo confirmarán los resultados del ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Shenik y Shenequa aparecieron en el programa de Maury el año pasado después de una prueba de ADN. ¿Pero ahora Shenik se acuesta con el novio de su hermana? Además, lo único que se interpone son los resultados de la prueba del detector de mentiras.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Danica, una nueva mamá, recibió 5 correos electrónicos diferentes de 5 mujeres asegurando que se acostaron con su novio, Jimmy, en su casa. Entonces, ¿el novio de Renee preferirá su adicción a su familia?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Dashawn y su mamá afirman que lo de Monica fue una aventura de una sola vez y que él no puede ser el padre de su bebé. Entonces, April quiere averiguar quién es el padre de su bebé. Después, ¿Frederick o Jason es el padre del bebé de Marietta?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury está celebrando las fiestas contando cuentos junto a la chimenea. Compartirá las historias de los antiguos invitados que vinieron a hacerse pruebas de paternidad, al detector de mentiras y más. ¡Averigua si estos invitados han sido buenos o malos!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: The Rap Game

programme.title: Dance Moms Series
programme.desc: The Dance Moms need to win this week's competition to stay in the game, but chaos ensues when Mom Kelly's daughter wants to drop out of dance as she's hurt her hip and she just wants to be a cheerleader.

programme.title: Dance Moms Series
programme.desc: Abby gives each girl one solo dance for the next competition. However, she gives two solos to her star dancer, Maddie, clearly providing her with an advantage over the others.

programme.title: Dance Moms Series

programme.title: Dance Moms Series
programme.desc: On their way to a big competition, Christi finds out her grandmother has just been admitted to a hospital. She now must choose what's more important to her--go to the hospital to sit by her grandmother's side or go to the dance competition.

programme.title: Dance Moms Series

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A young woman, deserted by her bridegroom, is charged with the murder of his uncle.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Only her infant grandson and a shocking murder convince a dowager to stop her one-woman control of an entire city.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.desc: A beautiful model leads Perry Mason to a missing heir's racket and murder.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When Rick and the Old Man buy an antique 19th Century wine-maker, Chumlee wants to put it into action. Will he succeed and brew a magnificent "Pawn Shop Pinot"?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick has a chance to buy a 1940 quartermasters spyglass that may be from a WWII ship. Can he discover the ship it came from, or will this deal sink?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys pick a Pennsylvania warehouse and find a rare comic book that gets Mike's "spidey" senses twitching. Frank tries to negotiate for a vintage cigarette machine with a lifetime collector who is also a reluctant seller.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While visiting the "Godfather of petroliana," Mike falls for a one-of-a-kind vintage motorcycle sign and must resist the urge to overpay for it.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With Frank too sick to go picking, Mike's brother Robbie scrambles to fill in at the last minute for the trip. In Idaho, the guys find a barn-sized man cave filled with an awesome collection of Western Americana.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: After taking a joyride on a rare 100 year old monster tractor, Mike and his brother Robbie take to a property packed with amazing steam engines and rusty relics.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Contestants compete with throwing knives and slingshots. Before guns, these were the weapons that defined the skills of a true marksman. In addition to the elimination challenge, another contestant suddenly goes home.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Antonio recruits Steve to help him trade up to a big rig for an old friend who is down on his luck.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Steve and Antonio welcome a new member to their team, and when they decide to go after a food truck for Steve s wife, Steve is forced to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Using muzzle-loading weapons from the revolutionary era, contestants compete in an old-fashioned frontier face-off. Meanwhile, a heated conflict in one team erupts and plays out in the elimination challenge.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Six weeks ago, three couples met at the altar and married as complete strangers. They were matched by experts, but now it's up to them to decide whether or not to continue their relationships. Will they stay married or opt for a divorce?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The three couples that were married at first sight learn about the importance of trust in their relationships. Will their marriages flourish?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Pawn Stars' "Old Man" Mr. Harrison stops by Count's Kustoms with a job that is as unique and old-fashioned as he is. Later, the guys aren't in love with Roli's new special custom project.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Out in Washington State, Mike and his brother Robbie stop off for a quick freestyle and come across a 1915 Harley.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys pick the collection of a reclusive and mysterious businessman named "the Colonel," who has gone to great lengths to keep his identity a secret.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys go hog wild at a sprawling ranch in Texas, where Mike flips for a VW bus that's been transformed into a hunting lodge on wheels.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Australia's Deadly Monsters

programme.desc: Whale Sharks, gentle giants of the sea, are nearly 50 feet in length and weigh over 30 tons! With recent technology, researchers can identify, catalogue and track individual sharks. Whale shark tourism has proven to be both a blessing and a curse.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness

programme.title: Dangerous Waters

programme.desc: Elk calls echo through the mountains where Laramy is hunting. As night falls, Laramy gets within shooting range of a huge elk.

programme.desc: Paul tries to find help for injured alligator's mouth.

programme.desc: Hear the stories of people who keep dangerous big cats, such as tigers, lions, and leopards, as pets and learn how just one mistake can result in devastating consequences.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Kimberly, Australia

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel and are shocked to see that its owner shares some of Sonia's features.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league softball team.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: With approximately 130 active volcanoes, Indonesia is arguably the most active place on earth. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer leads an expedition to some of Indonesia most remote and rarely visited volcanos.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Volcanic folklore is reflected in Mexican history. One of their ancient legends tells the story of the Aztec warrior Popocatépetl - a giant active volcano - who erupts to wake his sleeping princess Iztaccíhuatl, a neighboring extinct ice capped volcano.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: In Indonesia we find regions where the air is so toxic that it's 40 times above human safe levels and sulphuric acid vents from the ground in dense yellowish clouds. Elsewhere, small volcanoes are so active, they are said to erupt every 15 minutes!

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Japan is going through a seismic crisis after the devastating Tsunami of 2011. We look closely at two very dangerous volcanoes; both are considered to be in the top 5 most dangerous on the planet.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Oceania: The Tectonic Ring of Fire

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Asia: The Tectonics of Life and Death

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Asia: Rising Mountains and Sinking Countries

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Europe: Tropical Beginnings

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: The Mountains of North America haunt the imagination, masking a danger few are willing to confront. Despite the challenges, some choose to live this way.

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Black Gold

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: Big Dog's owner, Autry Stevens, races to save 4 expiring leases that will be worth half a billion dollars in oil production.

programme.title: Dual Survival

programme.title: Dual Survival
programme.desc: E.J. and Jeff are stranded in the scorching-hot savanna of southern Brazil.

programme.title: Dual Survival
programme.desc: E.J. and Jeff brave venomous pit vipers and wild boar in South America.

programme.title: Dual Survival

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Alan returns from China and gives Justin and Mike a cold dose of reality about the jade they're mining. As snow threatens to shut down the mine, the crew starts up a night shift under lights to beat the winter deadline.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Justin and Mike fight through snow and frozen water to get to the one potentially high-value slab of jade-the Big Fin. In Jade City, Claudia cuts open a tourist's 700-year- old dinosaur egg.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Winter arrives at Dynasty and the crew struggles to mine up to the last possible minute. Claudia and Robin are worried Justin and Mike are pushing themselves too hard.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Funding her mining season alone and determined to start her hunt for jade a month early, Claudia is forced to re-think her strategy when snow and high water stop the crew in their tracks.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robin follows a hunch to a new site at an old claim, while Josh's high expectations and short fuse test Gary's patience.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Kidd and Harry bring down an enormous bull bison; Eustace races the weather to provide his neighbors with heat; Martha and Elli battle nasty terrain while transporting their prized moose harvest back to civilization.

programme.title: Yukon Men
programme.desc: A large wildfire threatens to devour the village.

programme.title: Yukon Men
programme.desc: The villagers must adapt after Alaska's largest wildfire ravages Tanana.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Todd and Tamera prove they are NOT superheroes when they struggle to haul Batman's cape worn by Val Kilmer.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc lands a Frankenstein sized Munster load from the classic TV show.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Natasha risks profit and time when signals get crossed on the dimensions of a massive radio tower, while Dwight and Tyesha fear becoming the villains after a load of super hero statues get roughed up under their watch.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: A massive animatronic creature with a one-day deadline is nightmare fuel for Molly and Russell, while Tamara has dreams of a sweet payday getting an oversized wine barrel across the country.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: It's a "Battle of the Butchers" as Russia's ruthless Ivan the Terrible goes up against Spain's heartless Hernan Cortes.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: The French Foreign Legion, fearless desert fighters paid to kill, versus the Gurkhas, brazen Himalayan warriors who took up arms for England.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: It's an all-out war between two battlefield daredevils - American Rough Rider Teddy Roosevelt, versus Lawrence of Arabia, Britain's first Special Operative.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Chemical assassin and Iraqi dictator Saddam Hussein goes head-to-head with Cambodian communist leader Pol Pot, whose Khmer Rouge troops filled Cambodia's killing fields with millions of innocent victims.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: In this dramatic preview of World War 3, the U.S. Army Rangers, America's elite military strike-force takes aim at the North Korean Special Operations Forces, a fanatical commando division.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: Rangers Ricky and Bubba attempt to both go big and go home, Matt Blevins resorts to scare tactics, and Mary shows up with an old friend who keeps people guessing.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: The auction season concludes with a bang in Fort Worth. Moe the junk-hoarding foot doctor, now limited to one locker a year by his wife, returns for his annual purchase.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: The Storage Wars spread to the lone star state. The buyers have to be at the top of their game. Like oil, these lockers look crude, but to the trained eye, they're as good as gold.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: The auction heads to Irving, TX. Lesa and Moe go toe-to-toe for a unit with a mystical item. Victor flips a small locker for twenty-five times his initial investment. And Ricky and Bubba hit pay dirt with a locker containing sci-fi memorabilia.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: Arlington has the Texas buyers on the lookout. Ricky and Bubba play up their country roots in an attempt to juke the competition. Lesa treads on a snakeskin ensemble. And Victor goes after a scooter with a three thousand dollar potential.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: As the bidders arrive at Walt's Longview auction, they notice one major problem. There's a 100-buyers geared up to spend. With droves of bidders on the prowl--one buyer will have his clocked cleaned, while another cleans up with some antique clocks!

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: When a recently deceased tycoon's unit goes up for sale, the buyers ready themselves for all-out war. From an eight grand payout to a fistful of burgers, the buyers will have to come, guns ablazin' if they want to win this auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: The storage warriors journey back to Ft. Worth, Texas to a facility known for its deceptively bad looking lockers. But looks can be deceiving, as the worst-looking locker delivers the biggest payout.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas
programme.desc: When the buyers head to the conservative town of Burelson, Texas they find items that are anything but ordinary! Moe Prigoff is on the hunt for oddities. Lesa and Victor battle for a store display worth $8000.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía busca a un sospechoso en un barrio y lo encuentran en un aprieto. Se investiga a un auto estacionado detrás de una iglesia. Un oficial aconseja a una madre joven con un pasado problemático.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución a pie termina con el sospechoso en una situación vergonzosa. Un automovilista llama a la policía cuando un peatón pierde la calma. Un hombre arriesga su relación con malas manías.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor se enoja cuando se le interroga. Durante una persecución a coche un hombre le habla a su esposa y la policía se sorprende. Un mentiroso es atrapado y se le da una prueba de inocencia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Con la policía en los talones, el mundo se le cierra a un sospechoso. Una mujer llorando por su esposo violento llama a la policía. Durante un retén alguien intenta escapar de la policía y su pasado.

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX
programme.desc: La policía detiene a tres jóvenes traficantes de drogas, y persiguen a unos asaltantes en el bosque de Chapultepec, mientras el Equipo ERUM, acude a salvar a un hombre herido en la vía pública y atender a varias víctimas de un choque múltiple.

programme.title: ¡Alto! Frontera
programme.desc: Cocaína detectada en un calzoncillo y en una vitrina. En la frontera mexicana, llegan pandillas a complicar el difícil tránsito de migrantes

programme.title: ¡Alto! Frontera
programme.desc: Impactantes historias de inocentes y criminales acorralados en el tráfico de dinero y drogas en México, Chile, Perú Colombia y Bolivia.

programme.title: Emergencias bizarras
programme.desc: En este episodio, un hombre se resbala mientras trae tijeras al realizar una topiaria púbica; un trabajador petrolero es trasladado por aire desde el Mar del Norte por tragarse un pequeño palillo; y una víctima de una lesión por comida congelada.

programme.title: Emergencias bizarras
programme.desc: En este episodio, un pescador llega con una pesa de plomo enterrada en la cuenca del ojo; una lucha le rompe la parte superior de la columna a un hombre como si fuera una ramita; y un fiestero termina la noche con un hoyo en la cabeza.

programme.title: Rescate aéreo
programme.desc: Un caminante en problemas necesita que el equipo de rescate de Westpac realice su mayor cabrestante. Un movimiento en falso pondrá a todos en peligro.

programme.title: Rescate aéreo
programme.desc: El capitán de un barco sufre un golpe en el mar y está apenas consciente: es un rescate crítico.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso crea un enorme problema cuando decide huir. Una mujer confiesa sus fallas arriesgando su matrimonio. Los agentes investigan a una sospechosa, pero la amiga termina detenida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Rodeado de oficiales, un pasajero se arriesga. Se enojan dos compañeras cuando una le da de comer huevos a su perro. Un oficial actúa rápido al ver un objeto peligroso en el asiento de un vehículo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un preso en libertad condicional escapa de la policía, pero se le acaba la suerte. Una pareja alega y los vecinos hablan a la policía. Un hombre desorientado tiene un accidente raro y culpa al clima.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una pistola taser se descarga en un sospechoso errático. Un delincuente intenta convencer a los detectives de que no lo vieron cometer ningún crimen. Un oficial supervisa una transacción absurda.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un principiante lamenta su delito y decisiones destructivas. Un conductor no creíble le dice a la policía que es víctima de un crimen. Un oficial anima a una chica con problemas a cambiar su vida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso huyente inventa excusas para evitar la cárcel. Un conductor durmiéndose pide que la policía no le diga a su esposa. Una llamada de allanamiento causa un tormento en un vecindario.

programme.title: 1000 maneras de morir

programme.title: 1000 maneras de morir
programme.desc: Un rockero japonés muere en el escenario; un recluso arruina un intento de fuga; un compañero de cuarto se venga; bailarín muere asfixiado; terroristas tontos se derriten; obrero idiota cae duro; un tipo alto es aplastado en la Inglaterra medieval.

programme.title: 1000 maneras de morir

programme.desc: Beezy is jealous when his new pet rock favors Jimmy. --- Jimmy poses as Molotov and joins Lucius on the mission to defeat the horrible ‘Moon Beast’.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Miseryville goes into hibernation, Jimmy is the only one left awake. --- After Lucius loses his voice barking orders for his birthday party, Jimmy steps in to interpret the instructions.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy and Beezy take to nature when they decide there are too many rules in Miseryville, man. --- When Cerbee runs off with Jimmy's home, Heloise and Beezy fight over who gets Jimmy as a houseguest.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Heloise is irate when Jimmy and Beezy find, steal, and flaunt her secret stash of dolls. --- Jimmy and Beezy dress up as pandas in order to bust Cerbee out of an animals-only jail.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Lucius launches “Heinous,” a height-boosting new fragrance. --- Jimmy, Heloise, and Beezy discover the exclusive Heinous Chocolate Reserve.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: When a mysterious new villain destroys an island, the Skylanders bring Kaboom along in order to diffuse the villain's explosives.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Eruptor is convinced that Kaossandra is Strykore's evil spy and must be stopped.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: When Eon enlists the help of the famous Captain Flynn to assist the team in bringing Kaos to justice, the Skylanders discover the legendary stories about him may just be tall tales.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: When Eon is knocked unconscious, Jet-Vac and Dark Spyro are transported inside Eon's body and must work together to convince a visiting inspector not to shut the Academy down.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Hoping to become Kaossandra's protégé, Stealth Elf volunteers to accompany her on a mission.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: When it's discovered that Eon has been vaporized, Jet-Vac interrogates his three suspects.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: To gain info about the Wumpa Islands, Eruptor and Dark Spyro travel back in time to their first encounter with Crash Bandicoot.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: After Kat scratches Coop under a full moon, Dennis is convinced his best friend will transform into a deadly Were-Cat. // Kat tries to communicate with the Cat Nebula, setting up a rendezvous.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop and Dennis build a tree fort to get some Kat and little sister-free time. // Millie sells a record number of Greenie Girl Cookies but the boxes keep disappearing and all fingers point to Coop.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: After Kat learns X-Rays of him were taken on first trip to the Vet, he sneaks back to destroy them. // Coop’s new radio-controlled, rescue helicopter brings back memories for Dad of his favorite childhood toy.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop catches a nasty cold and has to stay home from school alone with Kat. // Coop and Dennis perform a magic show and make Kat disappear.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Kat’s new wind up mouse has a hypnotic effect on the other cats in the neighborhood. // Coop convinces Dad that he’s allergic to Kat so Dad will get rid of the pesky feline for good.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: When Coop and Kat get glued hand to paw they are forced to spend the day together. // Coop and Kat discover the prize for winning the neighborhood cat show is a year’s supply of Fishy Frisky Bits.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop’s got a big test but every time he tries to study Kat creates another distraction. // Coop discovers a self-help motivational tape in the House of Swap and turns his life around.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is under siege by ghosts and there is little Pac-Man can do about it without fresh berries from the Tree Of Life, which is hidden somewhere in the Netherworld and guarded not only by legions of ghosts, but fierce monsters!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci worries about Bentley as Ryan returns from jail, Amber thinks she could be pregnant, Cory talks to Cheyenne's boyfriend Matt, and Catelynn creates a gift for Carly.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: The moms head to Florida for their first girls-only vacation together, Cheyenne worries about fitting in, and Maci plans a surprise trip to a drag show for Amber's birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Tyler takes a trip to Texas to celebrate his sister's sobriety and contend with his father's relapse, and Amber finds out Leah's been having panic attacks.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci is hesitant to get Taylor a dirt bike for his birthday, Cheyenne is annoyed by the timing of Cory's vacation, and Amber and Gary discuss treating Leah's panic attacks.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne meets Matt's family, Maci and Taylor discuss their birth control options, Catelynn and Tyler cause a stir on social media, and Amber gets answers about her health.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler celebrate Carly's birthday without her, Maci sees Ryan at Bentley's baseball game, and Mackenzie suspects her husband may have cheated on her.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Matt take a trip to wine country with Ryder, Maci and Taylor look into permanent birth control options, and Mackenzie worries about Josh's loyalty.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci takes Bentley to a counselor, Catelynn and Tyler reunite with Carly, Mackenzie gets devastating news, Cheyenne addresses Taylor's racist tweets, and Amber is arrested.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber is released from jail. Mackenzie finds out that Josh cheated on her. Maci's son can't go to Jagger's party. Cheyenne's boyfriend moves to LA, but his housing puts strain on their relationship. Catelynn has a surprise for her and Tyler's anniversary.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn, Maci and Cheyenne travel to Indiana for Amber's court hearing, Mackenzie questions her relationship with Josh, and producers try to get Andrew's side of the story.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler debate bailing their friend Ashley out of jail, Mackenzie questions staying with Josh, and Maci wants to turn Chattanooga, TN, teal for PCOS Awareness Day.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne, Maci and Catelynn react to the leaked audio of Amber's altercation with Andrew, Mackenzie gets a birthday surprise from Josh, and Gary lends his support to Amber.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci's restraining order against Ryan is an obstacle on Bentley's birthday, Mackenzie gets an opportunity through cheer, and Cheyenne works on her event planning business.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn takes her mom on vacation to address their generational trauma, Mackenzie questions renewing her vows, and Maci finds a way to help young women afford birth control.
